title: ModMenu [BTW Port]
description: A mod menu for BTWCE through Legacy Fabric
body:
[Mod Menu Ornithe](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu-ornithe)'s BTWCE 3.x(Legacy Fabric) Port!

This fork is almost identical to the original, only replacing the parts that used [OSL](https://modrinth.com/mod/osl) with mixin, and adding BTWCE support.

Mod Menu lets you view all your installed mods and libraries together with their descriptions, authors and links to their websites or issue trackers.

![mod menu screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a376a5ac511ceb33de6ea7d3c5a5a959069eb7c9.png)
